utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan. All five categories appear, and each has sufficient details to meet the requirement (costs or explanation of inclusion). Thus, all 5 items are covered.
